response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Engineer with excellent exposure to high-throughput distributed systems and highly relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. While he lacks the required Python expertise, his strong TypeScript skills, polyglot background, and deep alignment with the agentic mindset make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Proven ability to design and scale high-throughput distributed systems, including handling millions of requests per second.
Strong background in modern engineering practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
concerns: No evidence of Python experience, which is listed as a must-have technical skill for the role.
Limited explicit mention of cross-functional stakeholder management or bridging product and engineering perspectives.
Resume shows a history of concurrent full-time and founder roles, which may raise questions about focus and operational bandwidth for an on-call role.
